mapper.sql: order_no, fault_type_id, status, supplier_id, create_time, update_time, user_id, latitude, longitude, address, remark, evaluate_status, cancel_time, supplier_lat, supplier_lng

o.order_no as orderNo, o.fault_type_id as faultTypeId, ft.name as faultTypeName, u.nickname, u.phone, o.address, o.latitude, o.longitude, o.remark, o.status, o.create_time as createTime, o.update_time as updateTime, o.cancel_time as cancelTime, o.supplier_id as supplierId, o.user_id as userId, o.evaluate_status as evaluateStatus, s.name as supplierName, s.contact as supplierContact, s.phone as supplierPhone, st.name as staffName, st.phone as staffPhone, st.skill as staffSkill
mapper.select: SELECT o.order_no AS orderNo, ft.name AS faultTypeName, u.nickname, u.phone, o.address, o.status, o.evaluate_status AS isEvaluated FROM t_order o LEFT JOIN t_user u ON o.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN t_fault_type ft ON o.fault_type_id = ft.id WHERE o.supplier_id = #{supplierId} ORDER BY o.create_time DESC

SELECT FROM t_order o LEFT JOIN t_user u ON o.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN t_fault_type ft ON o.fault_type_id = ft.id LEFT JOIN t_supplier s ON o.supplier_id = s.id LEFT JOIN t_order_staff os ON o.order_no = os.order_no LEFT JOIN t_staff st ON os.staff_id = st.id WHERE o.order_no = #{orderNo} AND o.user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_order WHERE supplier_id = #{supplierId} AND status = 'pending'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_order WHERE supplier_id = #{supplierId} AND DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_order WHERE supplier_id = #{supplierId} AND status = 'completed'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_order WHERE supplier_id = #{supplierId} AND status = 'completed' AND DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m')

SELECT FROM t_order o LEFT JOIN t_user u ON o.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN t_fault_type ft ON o.fault_type_id = ft.id LEFT JOIN t_supplier s ON o.supplier_id = s.id LEFT JOIN t_order_staff os ON o.order_no = os.order_no LEFT JOIN t_staff st ON os.staff_id = st.id WHERE o.supplier_id = #{supplierId} ORDER BY o.create_time DESC
